title: haplopappus fuligineus
intro: Haplopappus fuligineus, also known as the smoketop or smokebrush, is a shrubby plant native to the western regions of North America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Haplopappus fuligineus is said to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to ointments for topical application.
